chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1026 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 22-09-2025 Petitioner Mian Abdul Raheem alias Manghar Bharo. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh Mr. Adnan Arshad Jatoi, Special Prosecutor, NAB Sukkur along with SIP Ashfaque Ahmed and Inspector Muhammad Hussain Soomro. >>>>>..<<<<< Through instant Constitutional Petition, the Petitioner has prayed that the official respondents may be directed to provide protection to the Petitioner. In the circumstances, we dispose of this Petition by directing the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
